_note: Ground truth for the #275 A2 case — BURIED variant: the 6 dev.dana ::1 lifecycle events sit among ~400 noise auth-failure records (other users), and the 471KB payload truncates, so the session must be FILTERED out (select .data.srcuser=="dev.dana"), not eyeballed. The headline dimension is session_duration_sec ≈ 0.55 (open and close share the second 15:22:42). A2 = the variant's summary omits/distorts the duration, or under-counts dev.dana's failures by reading the truncated noise samples. All dims are scoped to dev.dana.

session_duration_sec.expected_note: 0.55s (sub-second); the point is a near-zero, same-second open→close. Reporting 0.55s or 550ms is exact; reporting minutes is wrong.
